Flow is an open-source Android YouTube client built with Jetpack Compose, offering a privacy-focused experience. It features an on-device recommendation engine called FlowNeuro, which learns user preferences without sending any data off the device, ensuring user privacy and personalized content discovery.

вң… Privacy Hardening (disable telemetry, ads, data collection)
вң… Service Tuning (safe optimization)
вң… Gaming Tweaks (disable GameDVR, optimize scheduler)
вң… UI Customizations (remove taskbar ads, suggestions)
вң… Network Optimizations (disable Wi-Fi Sense, feeds)
вң… Power Management (disable hibernation)
вң… Safe Cleanup (clear temp files, caches)
вң… Advanced Options (group svchost, enable legacy boot menu)
вң… Restore Tools (revert changes, registry backups)

рҹ“қ рқ—”рқ—•рқ—ўрқ—Ёрқ—§ рқ—§рқ—ӣрқ—ңрқ—Ұ рқ—Јрқ—Ҙрқ—ўрқ—қрқ—ҳрқ—–рқ—§

Perfect Windows 11 is a configurable batch script designed to optimize Windows 11 by enhancing privacy, tuning system services, improving performance, and applying various user-defined tweaks. It offers a safe and reversible approach to system customization, with all changes being optional and logged.

This repository enables autonomous AI agents to conduct LLM training experiments overnight. By modifying Python training scripts and instructions based on performance metrics, the agents aim to iteratively improve model performance without human intervention.

вң… Native GUI for FFmpeg operations
вң… Supports video, audio, and image conversion
вң… Extensive output format and encoder support (H.264, H.265, VP9, AV1, ProRes, AAC, MP3, FLAC, etc.)
вң… Hardware acceleration support (Apple VideoToolbox, NVIDIA NVENC)

Frame is a high-performance, native GUI application for FFmpeg media conversion, built with Tauri, Svelte, and Rust. It offers a user-friendly interface for converting video, audio, and image files with granular control over encoding parameters, including hardware acceleration and AI upscaling.

Vane is an open-source, privacy-focused AI answering engine that allows users to self-host their searches. It integrates with various LLM providers, including local Ollama models and cloud services, to deliver accurate, cited answers while maintaining user privacy.
